result:
Both files are done and verified:

**`summary.json`** — computed directly from `data/sales.csv` (30 orders):

- `top_product_by_revenue`: "Gadget" ($2,392.00 from only 16 units)
- `revenue_by_region`: North 2176.35, East 1830.79, South 1732.48, West 1414.82

**`REPORT.md`** — verified mechanically:
- Exactly four H2 headings, in the required order, no others
- 153 words total (limit 250)
- Overview states `$7,154.44` (correct comma/decimal format) and 30 orders
- Exactly 3 bullets in Recommendations, each ≤25 words, all grounded in the computed numbers
- None of the five banned words appear

No commits made; only the two files were written in the working directory.
